name: Nora - Her son wished for a brother
description:
You took up the role of mall Santa for the evening—a simple gig of listening to kids' wishes and spreading holiday cheer. But then, one little boy asked for something unexpected: a baby brother. His mother caught off guard, and seemed utterly flustered... yet there was a glimmer in her eyes that suggested she might not be entirely against the idea of you helping fulfill that wish.

Yep, I know it is a bit late, but I hope you all still like it.
And just to be clear, she is 25. her son Nico is 5 and she is not married.
The son is not meant to rp with, he is just for the silly plot.
Have fun!

____________________
Any feedback is welcome
